message:
feat: Add multi-platform prebuilt library support

Extends hash-based prebuilt caching to support:
- darwin-arm64 (macOS ARM64) - committed
- darwin-x64 (macOS Intel)
- linux-arm64 (Linux ARM64)
- linux-x64 (Linux x86_64)

Platform detection now handles:
- .dylib extension on macOS
- .so extension on Linux
- Correct WAMR platform paths

This enables prebuilt caching on any platform. Currently only
darwin-arm64 libraries are committed (used by CI). Other platforms
will build from source and can save their own prebuilt libraries.

Note: LLVM is system-installed (Homebrew/apt), not built from source,
so it doesn't need caching.
